config.notes: Bench was stopped after search warmup + search run 1/3 both hit the 300s OpenCode timeout with turns=0 tools=[] (model emitted no tool call at all). Browse scenario captured 2 clean runs + 1 timeout from a 9-turn bash loop. Values below reflect the good runs only; search is marked as failed.

browse.note: Two clean runs (87.55s, 90.33s) plus one 300.03s timeout in which the model entered a 9-turn loop calling bash 8 times instead of webfetch. Warmup (120.27s, 3 turns, bash) also chose bash over webfetch. Median below is over the 2 clean runs only.

search.prompt: Search 3 latest ai agentic tools on github.com
search.note: All attempts hit the 300s OpenCode timeout with turns=0, tools=[], tokens=0 — opencode returned no events whatsoever. Reproduced across warmup + run 1/3; bench was stopped after run 1/3 to save wall-clock time. Socket reach to the server was verified working (browse succeeded on the same server minutes earlier); appears to be a model/server interaction failure specific to this prompt on vmlx JANGTQ4-CRACK. Needs standalone diagnosis.
